title: onagra arguta
intro: Onagra arguta, also known as edible poppy or California poppy, is a delicate annual plant native to Western North America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloids, including isopelletierine and protopine, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Onagra arguta is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural pain reliever. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and its seeds can be eaten raw or used as a spice in cooking.
